title: WeirauchLab/nf-encode-chip pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

id.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

control_sample_id.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

control_group_id.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

group.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

chip_mode.errorMessage: Must be one of the following: 'tf', 'histone'

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

adapter_1.errorMessage: The supplied adapter sequence for read 1 is not valid

adapter_2.errorMessage: The supplied adapter sequence for read 2 is not valid

subsample_prop.errorMessage: Subsample proportion must be a number between 0 and 1
